channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 10%.

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer accuses Musk of trying to whip up division over Henry Nowak murder
item.description: Starmer accuses Musk of trying to whip up division over Henry Nowak murder

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Boris Johnson described Theresa May as a ‘giant yucca tree under whose shade everything dies’

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer ‘100% behind’ MP suing Elon Musk’s xAI over Grok images

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I instinctively agree with this but I’m aware that because I now find Question Time unbearable, I have no sense of what Fiona Bruce’s style is like beyond “I hate what this programme is like now”. Could easily just be...
item.description: I instinctively agree with this but I’m aware that because I now find Question Time unbearable, I have no sense of what Fiona Bruce’s style is like beyond “I hate what this programme is like now”. Could easily just be...
